name: Barbell Hip Thrust
setup: Bench behind you, shoulder blades resting on bench edge
Feet flat on floor, shins vertical at top position
Barbell held in place with hands
execution: Drive hips up until thighs parallel to floor (or slight hyperextension)
Squeeze glutes hard at top, hold 1 second
Lower under control — don't drop hips
common_mistakes: Not going to parallel at top (partial ROM)
Using lower back instead of glutes (hyperextension)
cues: At the top: glutes, not lower back
